import React, { useEffect } from 'react'; import './styles/index.css'; function App() { useEffect(() => { const sections = document.querySelectorAll('.section'); const observer = new IntersectionObserver( (entries) => { entries.forEach((entry) => { if (entry.isIntersecting) { entry.target.classList.add('visible'); } }); }, { threshold: 0.1 } ); sections.forEach((section) => observer.observe(section)); }, []); return (

Bilal Ahmed

Email: mr.bilal.ahmed281@gmail.com | Phone: +92 (318)-7584281 | Address: Mianwali, Pakistan

Objective

Experienced Software Engineer with a demonstrated history of working in the information technology industry. Skilled in Python, C++, JavaScript, React. Strong engineering professional with a Bachelor’s Degree focused in Software Engineering from The University of Mianwali.

Education

  • Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering - The University of Mianwali (2022-2026)

    CGPA: 2.77/4.0

  • HSSC - The Superior Group of Colleges, Pakistan (2020-2022)

    Marks: 815/1100

  • SSC - Govt. High School, Shadia, Pakistan (2018-2020)

    Marks: 911/1100

Projects

  • Spotify Clone - HTML, CSS, JavaScript

    Built a front-end clone of Spotify with a stylish UI and responsive layout.

  • University Challan Generator - PHP, MySQL, HTML, CSS

    Developed a system to generate student fee challans dynamically.

  • Bakery Management System - PHP, MySQL, JavaScript

    Created a web app for managing bakery products, orders, and stock.

  • Swift Converter (Ongoing) - HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP

    Multi-functional web app to convert PDF ↔ Word/Image, Image ↔ Text, etc.

  • Image Gallery - HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP

    Developed a web application for showing images of Mosques.

Skills

  • Operating Systems: Linux (Kali, Ubuntu), Windows
  • Languages: Python, C++, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP, MySQL, ReactJS
  • Tools: VS Code, MS Office, Git & GitHub
  • Web Frameworks: Bootstrap, Flask, OpenCV, TensorFlow, FastAPI, ReactJS
  • Databases: SQL Server, MySQL, XAMPP Server

Honors and Awards

  • Successfully completed the DELTA BATCH Full Stack Development on Apna College, India.
  • Participated in the GENZ CODING QUEST Coding Competition at University of Mianwali.
  • Participated in First Frontiers in Computational Intelligence & Data Science Conference 2025.
  • 3rd Open International Internet Ecology Olympiad.
  • Police and Rescue Training at University of Mianwali and Police station, Mianwali.
